prompt: Create an icon-only professional logo mark for Stanley Systems for a website footer badge and favicon. No text, no wordmark, no letters floating separately outside the mark. Must be a single compact emblem that feels trustworthy, industrial, structured, and premium for blue-collar service business owners (marine service, contractors, field service). Style: minimal flat vector, deep green + charcoal + off-white, strong geometry, practical not trendy, not tech-bro, not abstract art. Suggest systems, reliability, clean handoffs, operational order. Centered square composition on transparent background. Logo only.
